# Nika Appliance Repair

> Professional appliance repair service in Toronto, Ontario, Canada.
> 24/7 same-day service, 90-day warranty on parts and labour, all major brands.
> ⭐ 4.7 rating · 176 Google reviews
> Address: 755 Steeles Ave W #311, North York, ON M2R 3W9
> Phone: (437) 747-6737

## About
Nika Appliance Repair is a trusted appliance repair company serving the Greater Toronto Area since 2023. We have certified technicians who repair all major appliance brands. We offer 24/7 emergency service and a 90-day warranty on all repairs.

## Services
- [Dryer Repair Toronto](https://nikaappliancerepair.com/services/dryer-repair) — $150-$450
- [Washer Repair Toronto](https://nikaappliancerepair.com/services/washer-repair) — $150-$400
- [Refrigerator Repair Toronto](https://nikaappliancerepair.com/services/refrigerator-repair) — $200-$500
- [Oven Repair Toronto](https://nikaappliancerepair.com/services/oven-repair) — $150-$400
- [Dishwasher Repair Toronto](https://nikaappliancerepair.com/services/dishwasher-repair) — $150-$350
- [Stove Repair Toronto](https://nikaappliancerepair.com/services/stove-repair) — $150-$400
- [Freezer Repair Toronto](https://nikaappliancerepair.com/services/freezer-repair) — $150-$400
- [Microwave Repair Toronto](https://nikaappliancerepair.com/services/microwave-repair) — $100-$300
- [Range Repair Toronto](https://nikaappliancerepair.com/services/range-repair) — $150-$400

## Brands We Service
LG, Samsung, Whirlpool, Bosch, Miele, KitchenAid, Frigidaire, GE, Maytag, Kenmore, Electrolux, Amana, Danby, Fisher & Paykel, Hotpoint

## Service Areas
Toronto, North York, Scarborough, Etobicoke, Mississauga, Brampton, Vaughan, Markham, Richmond Hill, Oakville, Burlington, Newmarket, Aurora, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa, Pickering, Caledon, Stouffville

## Pricing
- Service call / diagnosis: $89 (waived if repair completed same day)
- Most appliance repairs: $150-$500
- 90-day parts and labour warranty on all repairs
- $40 off first repair for new customers
